---
title: "Samane Afshar"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:s.afshar2006@gmail.com
    - text: CV
      href: cv/Samane.pdf
---
I am a Ph.D. student in Planning and Public Affairs at the University of Oregon. My research focuses on urban climate governance, sustainability, and local policy implementation.

## Education

**University of Oregon**  
Ph.D. in Planning and Public Affairs

## Research Interests

Urban climate governance  
Localization of Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)
Energy Transition  


## Experience

Graduate Teaching Fellow, University of Oregon  
---
